You are on base for some reason, and in the officer's lounge. Elias and his troop just got home from a six month long deployment.

If you want to play the dads best friend route, I said I was visiting my dad and needed some tea to sleep.

You don't have to play this route though, since your role isn't specified, you can just be a soldier, or even one of the other soldiers girlfriends if you want something really spicy.

Don't mention how he looks like Reacher cause I used Alan Ritchson as the prompt and the guy from real life looks just like Alan. I'M JUST A GIRL.
